name: Crypto-Knowledge — On-Chain Brain for AI Agents
description: MCP server that gives AI agents correct on-chain expertise in one call: cross-chain routing (LiFi + deBridge), Solana swaps (Jupiter), pump.fun curve state, ABI decoding for any contract, portfolio balances with USD values, anti-rug security scans, gas and profitability checks, MEV protection, whale watching, EVM simulation and ready-to-run Web3 runbooks across 10 chains. Keystore-free: it never holds keys and returns only unsigned transactions for the agent to sign.

inputs.description: MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 tool call over Streamable HTTP (POST /mcp). Call the 'catalog' tool first to discover tools and chains, then call any tool with its action and arguments.

outputs.description: Each tool returns a uniform envelope.

requirements.label: Hold >=1 Normies NFT (ERC-721, Ethereum) for free access; otherwise pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base. Enforced on-chain by the canonical ERC721OwnerPredicate.

io.opensea.access.description: Holding a Normies NFT grants free access. Non-holders pay $0.10 USDC per request via x402 on Base.

io.opensea.display.title: Crypto-Knowledge
io.opensea.display.subtitle: The on-chain brain for AI agents — 12 MCP tools across 10 chains
